name: Morning Briefing
description: Daily club agenda, upcoming events, and action items (weekdays 7 AM PT)

name: Meeting Follow-up Detection
description: Check for recent meetings and extract action items (every 30 min, business hours)

description: Draft weekly club status update for leadership review (Saturday 8 PM PT)

name: Weekly Update Send
description: Send approved weekly update to club leadership (Monday 5 AM PT — disabled until email configured)
